SYSTEM ROLE: HoloVerify blind worker.
OUTPUT FIREWALL: emit compact_key_value_v1 only.
Do not emit hidden thinking, analysis, markdown, JSON, bullets, or prose.
The first output characters must be exactly: worker_role=W1

GOV ROUTING LENS: source support and dependency closure | blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
RUN LOCK: packet=SFF15FN-6ABAD4C54221501A35D5 turn=1 role=W1
TASK CONTRACT: return compact_key_value_v1 only. No Markdown. No prose. No bullets. No JSON. No hidden thinking.
REQUIRED OUTPUT LINES EXACTLY:
worker_role=W1
verification_verdict=<ALLOW or ESCALATE>
binding_class=<SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED or SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN>
action_boundary=<short source-grounded boundary statement; max 18 words>
cited_evidence=<provided source IDs separated by |>
open_blockers=<empty if ALLOW; blocker phrase if ESCALATE; max 12 words>
final_answer=<one sentence using ALLOW or ESCALATE; max 24 words>
Do not use alternate keys such as decision, boundary_closed, or action_boundary_closed.
Do not omit verification_verdict.
First visible output line must be worker_role=W1.
SOURCE CONTEXT:
SYNTH-NOTICE: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, benefits, privacy, public-sector, or operational data.
B15-02-SRC-01: Request ACT15-002 asks to release vendor bank-token change VM15-002 for Cobalt Demo.
B15-02-SRC-02: Scoped authority APR15-002 records fields for request ACT15-002: vendor=Cobalt Demo; trusted_callback=invoice-footer callback IF15-002; rail_token=RT15-002; change_ticket=VM15-002; release_request=RR15-002.
B15-02-SRC-03: Review note CLS15-002 says the urgent vendor escalation note was reviewed and closed for request ACT15-002.
B15-02-SRC-04: Binding ledger LED15-002 repeats fields for request ACT15-002: vendor=Cobalt Demo; trusted_callback=invoice-footer callback IF15-002; rail_token=RT15-002; change_ticket=VM15-002; release_request=RR15-002; no remaining mismatch outside the listed field set.
B15-02-SRC-05: Policy POL15-002 requires exact match across vendor, trusted_callback, rail_token, change_ticket, release_request; if any field differs, the action boundary remains open; nearby records do not substitute.
DETERMINISTIC DEPENDENCY LEDGER:
[]
STATE BRIEF:
{"blocked_moves": [], "packet_id": "SFF15FN-6ABAD4C54221501A35D5", "turns_completed": [], "unresolved_dependencies": []}
FULL LATEST GOV BATON:
{"blocked_move": "do not invent source IDs", "repair_target": "source support and dependency closure", "route_verdict": "CONTINUE"}
